scripts.lint:all: pnpm run lint:domain && pnpm run lint:backend && pnpm run lint:frontend
scripts.typecheck:all: pnpm run typecheck:backend && pnpm run typecheck:frontend
scripts.build:all: pnpm run build:domain && pnpm run build:backend && pnpm run build:frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "pnpm --filter chargecaster-backend backend:dev:api" "VITE_TRPC_URL=http://localhost:4000/trpc pnpm --filter chargecaster-frontend dev"
